flask.name: Flask of the Shattered Sun
flask.note: Alt: Flask of the Magisters, Cauldron of Sin'dorei Flasks

potions.name: Potion of Recklessness
potions.description: is your best option, provided you can make it provide Critical Strike, which requires extra sequencing and gear setups.

potions.name: Light's Potential
potions.description: is just behind and can be used instead.

food.name: Silvermoon Parade
food.description: or other primary stat Feast if possible.

flask.name: Flask of the Blood Knights
flask.description: for Haste, but if you are very heavy on Haste gear you can choose to use Flask of the Shattered Sun for Critical Strike or Flask of Thalassian Resistance for Versatility instead.
flask.note: Alt: Flask of the Shattered Sun, Flask of Thalassian Resistance

potions.name: Potion of Recklessness
potions.description: for a massive burst of your highest Secondary Stat, which is usually going to be Haste, at a small loss of your lowest Secondary Stat.

food.name: Silvermoon Parade
food.description: , and if that is not available you can use Royal Roast for yourself.

flask.name: Flask of the Magisters
flask.description: is the preferred choice, as the Mastery it provides is more desired for Devourer Flask of the Blood Knights — can instead be used if you prefer the Haste, which can help to make your rota
flask.note: Alt: Flask of the Blood Knights, Cauldron of Sin'dorei Flasks

potions.name: Potion of Recklessness
potions.description: is your best option, and should be paired with major cooldowns and Bloodlust / Heroism .

demon-hunter-havoc.summary: Maintain Immolation Aura on CD, route Fury into Eye Beam windows, dump with Annihilation in AoE and Blade Dance in Cleave.
priority: Keep Immolation Aura active in combat
Eye Beam off cooldown inside The Hunt windows
Annihilation as primary Fury dump; Blade Dance at 2+ targets
Chaos Strike to avoid Fury capping

demon-hunter-vengeance.summary: Maintain Demon Spikes on CD, route Soul Fragments into Soul Carver windows, use Fiery Brand as a major defensive.
priority: Soul Cleave to consume excess Soul Fragments
Metamorphosis as a major defensive on heavy damage
Sigil of Spite on cooldown for AoE threat

demon-hunter-devourer.summary: Build Soul Fragments, ascend into Void Metamorphosis, fire Collapsing Stars as apex spells; weave Voidblade for melee combo sequences.
priority: Voidblade on cooldown to generate Fury and start melee combos
Collapsing Star during Void Metamorphosis windows
Hungering Slash to maintain the Void Metamorphosis buff
